use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms and user interactions
Loading state indicators with spinner integration
Error and warning state feedback buttons
Disabled state handling for conditional interactions
Icon and text combinations with prefix/suffix support
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component featuring multiple visual types (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), three shape variants (square, circle, rounded), and four size options. Supports loading states with spinner integration, disabled states, full-width layout, and optional shadow styling. Designed with hover interactions and clean minimalist aesthetics suitable for modern SaaS and fintech applications.
